description: Canonical visual descriptors for Bharatvarsh characters. Source: SKILL_BHARATVARSH_ART_PROMPTS.md Phase 3. Visual DNA MUST be included verbatim in every prompt featuring the character.
model_routing_note: Use Seedream 4.5 for all character portrait/face/costume generation (attach expression sheet + front reference as IP-Adapter input). Use Nano Banana only for environment/scenery shots where character face accuracy is not critical.

characters.name: Kahaan
characters.visual_dna: Young Indian man, early 30s, military bearing. Close-cropped black hair with clean fade. Sharp defined jaw, high cheekbones, warm brown skin. Intense dark brown eyes conveying intelligence and controlled intensity. Small floating tactical lens/HUD monocle hovering near right eye emitting faint blue-white light. Wearing Bharatsena dress uniform: dark navy fitted jacket with structured shoulders, gold piping on collar and cuffs, rank insignia on chest. Athletic build, upright posture. Expression: focused, contemplative, carrying weight of authority.
characters.signature_element: The floating tactical lens — this is his visual signature and MUST appear in every portrait.

reference_images.notes: ALWAYS attach 'Kahaan Expressions.jpg' as primary face anchor. Add 'Kahaan Front.png' for full-body costume accuracy. The expressions sheet has 9 variants covering the full emotional range.

characters.name: Rudra
characters.visual_dna: Indian man, mid-30s, muscular powerful build. Battle-worn but disciplined. Short dark hair with topknot, full beard, olive/tan skin. Deep-set intense dark eyes with a warrior's focus. Grey Trident insignia tattooed on chest. Devanagari 'तत् त्वम् असि' tattooed on shoulder blade. Armband with trident below right elbow. Wearing hooded olive-green jacket over tan undershirt, or tactical combat gear depending on context. Scarring on forearms suggesting combat history. Expression: quiet intensity, coiled readiness, unwavering loyalty. Posture: grounded, alert, ready to act.

faction_color_accent.description: Grey Trident legacy — desaturated grey-blue tones. Earth palette (sage, brown) for civilian look.

characters.signature_element: Grey Trident tattoo on chest, Devanagari script tattoo, Rudra's curved machete

reference_images.notes: ALWAYS attach 'Rudra Expressions.png' as face anchor. For close-ups, also attach 'Rudra Tattoos.png' to ensure spiritual/cultural markers are accurate. Rudra's look is earth-toned and rustic — contrasts sharply with Kahaan's tech-military aesthetic.

characters.name: General Pratap
characters.visual_dna: Indian man, late 50s, commanding presence. Silver-streaked hair swept back neatly. Gray mustache. Deep lines on face suggesting decades of difficult decisions. Piercing dark eyes that assess and calculate. Clean-shaven chin, patrician features. Wearing Directorate high command uniform: dark navy long coat with gold epaulettes, chest covered in service decorations and campaign ribbons. Large gold/bronze circular emblem (crossed weapons/laurel wreath) on back of tunic. Tall, straight posture despite age. Hands often clasped behind back or resting on desk/table. Expression: absolute authority, controlled calm masking ruthlessness.
characters.signature_element: Gold epaulettes, service decorations, commanding posture, back emblem

reference_images.notes: No expression sheet available yet. Use 'Pratap Front.png' as primary face/costume anchor. The back view shows the critical gold emblem — include when Pratap is shown from behind.

characters.name: Hana
characters.visual_dna: Young woman, late 20s. Delicate but resilient features. Short dark hair with side-swept fringe. Perceptive eyes. Wearing dark tactical bodysuit for operations or dark blazer suit for formal contexts. Sniper rifle with scope is her primary weapon. Rooftop operational environment. Expression: quiet intelligence, guarded warmth, the weight of knowing something others don't. Carries herself with fluid grace, aware of surroundings.

faction_color_accent.description: Dark navy tactical + cool urban blues. Warmer earth tones in civilian contexts.

characters.signature_element: Sniper rifle, rooftop tactical position, holographic HUD elements

reference_images.notes: No expression sheet available yet. Use 'Hana_Front_Battle.png' for action/tactical context and 'Hana Card.png' for civilian/formal scenes. The banner image shows her signature rooftop overwatch composition.

characters.name: Arshi
characters.visual_dna: ⛔ CLASSIFIED — No public-facing art generation permitted. Use silhouette, obscured face, or atmospheric suggestion only. If absolutely needed for teaser content: "Mysterious figure, face hidden in shadow, only the suggestion of a presence at the edge of light. Obsidian palette. No identifiable features."

faction_color_accent.description: Teal/dark blue geometric aesthetic (from reference images — INTERNAL USE ONLY)

characters.signature_element: Geometric triangle emblem — but classified for public content

reference_images.notes: ⛔ These references exist for INTERNAL pipeline use ONLY. Any public-facing content must use silhouette, obscured face, or atmospheric suggestion. Do NOT attach these as generation references for public content.

characters.name: Surya
characters.visual_dna: Military commander in high-tech tactical bodysuit. Dark gray armor plating with cyan/turquoise tech accents. 'GUHYAKAS' nameplate visible. Indian flag patch on arm. Muscular athletic build. Modern military sci-fi soldier aesthetic.

faction_color_accent.description: Dark gray charcoal armor + cyan/turquoise highlights

characters.signature_element: GUHYAKAS nameplate, high-tech bodysuit armor, Indian flag patch

reference_images.notes: No expression sheet available yet. Use 'Surya Front.jpg' for primary face/armor anchor. Shows the high-tech military aesthetic that contrasts with Rudra's rustic warrior look.
